commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=9a5f38fa53ed7c8488920fa5d470871e91f039b8)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Slack outbound adapter check that throws when a threaded send result does not confirm the requested thread timestamp, plus regression tests for confirmed and unconfirmed payload sends.

PR surface: Source +27, Tests +56. Total +83 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the introduced regression: source inspection shows the real Slack send result returns `threadTs`, while the PR checks `threadId` and then compares the child reply `messageId` to the parent thread timestamp. The broader linked issue still lacks a live reduced Slack reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the branch has a blocking code finding and missing contributor real Slack proof; automation should not mark it merge-ready without contributor-provided proof.

target.title: fix(slack): fail unconfirmed threaded deliveries
target.body:
## Summary
- Fail Slack outbound payload delivery when a threaded send does not confirm the expected Slack thread timestamp.
- Keep successful threaded sends working when Slack returns the matching `threadId`/thread timestamp.
- Add regression coverage for confirmed and unconfirmed threaded payload delivery.

## Issue / Motivation
Fixes #96692.

Slack-originated long-running or delegated workflows should not treat answer generation as success if the final Slack send did not land in the originating thread. This makes the existing outbound Slack payload seam fail closed when a thread target is requested but the send result does not confirm that thread.

## Changes
- Adds a thread-delivery assertion in the Slack outbound adapter after each send.
- Accepts confirmed sends when Slack returns the requested thread timestamp as `threadId` or, for root-thread sends, `messageId`.
- Throws a descriptive delivery error when Slack returns a different message/thread id for a threaded send.
- Extends Slack outbound adapter tests for missing, mismatched, and confirmed thread delivery results.

## Testing
- `pnpm test:extension slack -- extensions/slack/src/outbound-adapter.test.ts`
- `node node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.extensions.json extensions/slack/src/outbound-adapter.ts extensions/slack/src/outbound-adapter.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- Secret scan over `git diff`

Note: I also attempted the broader extension test typecheck lanes (`pnpm tsgo:extensions:test --pretty false` and `pnpm exec tsgo -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --pretty false --noEmit --incremental false`), but both exceeded 5 minutes locally without producing diagnostics, so I kept the validated targeted Slack test/lint gate above.
target.author: lin-hongkuan
